programme.sub-title: Chapter 1: A Body in the Bay

programme.title: The Jinx: The Life and Deaths of Robert Durst

programme.title: The Jinx: The Life and Deaths of Robert Durst
programme.desc: In 2000, a tip leads a district attorney to re-open the investigation into the disappearance of Kathie Durst; investigators begin to focus on Durst's close friend, Susan Berman, a witness who was overlooked in 1982; Susan Berman is found murdered.

programme.title: The Jinx: The Life and Deaths of Robert Durst
programme.sub-title: Chapter 4: The State of Texas vs. Robert Durst

programme.title: The Jinx: The Life and Deaths of Robert Durst
programme.desc: In the 33 years since her disappearance, family and friends of Kathie Durst continue to hunt for the truth about what happened to her.

programme.title: The Jinx: The Life and Deaths of Robert Durst
programme.sub-title: Chapter 6: What the Hell Did I Do?

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House

programme.title: Wild Vacation Rentals

programme.title: Wild Vacation Rentals

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Choosing a Poolside Paradise in Costa Rica

programme.title: House Hunters

programme.title: Movie
